title: VisReleaseConfig
description: Schema for the `release` block inside vis.config.ts (RFC §8.1).

baseBranch.description: Branch used for `--from` baseline in status/generate.

defaultManaged.description: Default value of release.managed for unconfigured packages.

currentVersionResolver.description: Source of truth for the per-package oldVersion field of the release plan. "disk" reads package.json#version, "registry" queries the package registry (npm view / cargo search / etc.), "git-tag" parses the latest releaseTagPattern-matching git tag. Non-disk modes fall back to the manifest on lookup failure and surface a plan warning. The --first-release CLI flag is the bootstrap shortcut: it forces "disk" + skips remote tag-collision checks.

successWalk.description: Post-release walk: drop a sticky per-PR comment and/or labels on the PRs included in a release. Default OFF; set `successWalk: {}` to opt in with defaults.

enabled.description: Enable the walk. Defaults to true when `successWalk` is present.

commentBody.description: Override the sticky comment body template.

labels.description: Labels to add to each released PR.

skipPrerelease.description: Skip the walk for prerelease channels.

bumpDevDependencies.description: Opt-in cascade for `devDependencies` bumps (changesets #944 parity). When `true`, any source bump cascades a patch to devDep consumers. When an array of package names, only listed sources cascade through devDeps. Default false.

detectCatalogChanges.description: Opt-in cascade for pnpm-workspace.yaml catalog version bumps (changesets #1707 parity). When `true`, vis diffs the catalog blocks between HEAD~1 and HEAD; consumer packages of any moved entry get a patch bump attributed as CATALOG_CHANGED. Default false.

discussionCategory.description: GitHub-only: link each created release to a Discussion in the named category (e.g. "Announcements"). The category must already exist.

draftRelease.description: Create the forge release as a draft (invisible until manually published from the UI). Useful when release notes need human review before going public.

noRelease.description: Skip creating the GitHub / GitLab Release entirely while still pushing the git tag + publishing the package. Useful for teams who manage release notes elsewhere. Release-please parity: #1295.

addReleases.description: Semantic-release/github parity. Prepend ("top") or append ("bottom") a "Related releases" block linking to the previous N releases of the same package. Aids navigation in the GH Releases UI. Honoured on GitHub; GitLab logs a warning. Aggregate-release mode is skipped (no per-package prior).

extraFiles.description: Workspace-level files to regex-substitute the new version into (README badges, version constants, Cargo.toml, etc.). Paths are workspace-root-relative.

stage.description: Use npm's staged-publishing flow (`npm stage publish`). The publish step blocks until a maintainer approves via 2FA on npmjs.com or `vis release stage approve <id>`. Rejection / timeout flow through skipped[] — CI stays green. Requires npm ≥ 11.15.0 + registry.npmjs.org.

timeoutMs.description: Hard deadline for the approval wait in ms. Default 1_800_000 (30 min).

pollIntervalMs.description: Sleep between npm stage view checks in ms. Default 15_000 (15s).

notifications.description: Post-release fan-out to chat / webhook destinations. Each channel runs in parallel; per-channel failures log a warning but do NOT fail the publish.

skipPrerelease.description: Skip notifications when every published version carries a `-…` prerelease suffix.

plugins.description: Custom channel modules. Each entry is a path or [path, options].

gitSignCommits.description: Sign release-flow commits with `git commit -S`. Requires the active git identity to have a configured signing key (gpg, ssh, x509).

signing.description: Sign release tags. Wraps `git tag -s` / `-u <key>` and adds a `gitsign`-based code path for sigstore-style keyless signing. Modes: `gpg` (relies on `user.signingkey`), `ssh` (requires `gpg.format=ssh` + `user.signingkey=<path>`), `sigstore` (experimental — uses `gitsign` when on PATH, otherwise falls back to GPG with a warning). Per-package signing is not supported (release tags are a workspace-wide artefact). Release-please parity: #1738, #1314.

key.description: Optional signing key id / path passed via `git tag -u <key>` for `gpg` / `ssh` modes.

floatingMajorTag.description: When `true`, every non-prerelease, non-private release also force-updates a `<safe-name>-v<major>` tag to point at the release commit. `safe-name` is the package name with the leading `@` stripped and `/` replaced by `-` (e.g. `@acme/action` → `acme-action-v1`, `@vendor/cli` → `vendor-cli-v1`, unscoped `cli` → `cli-v1`). Useful for reusable GitHub Actions consumers who pin to `acme/action@acme-action-v1` and expect automatic patch / minor delivery without a tag-rev migration. Skipped on prereleases, on packages whose `releaseTagPattern` already includes `{major}`, and on private packages or those with `skipNpmPublish: true`. Semantic-release parity: #1515.

bumpMinorPreMajor.description: For pre-1.0 versions, demote `major` bumps to `minor`. Keeps 0.x libraries from leaping to 2.0 on the first breaking change. Maps to release-please's same-named flag.

bumpPatchForMinorPreMajor.description: For pre-1.0 versions, also demote `minor` bumps to `patch`. No-op without `bumpMinorPreMajor`.

labels.description: Labels applied to the version PR every refresh. Default: ["autorelease: pending"]. Set to [] to disable.

reviewers.description: Auto-request reviews from these users / teams on PR creation. GitHub: usernames or `org/team`.

assignees.description: Auto-assign the PR to these users on creation.

autoMerge.description: Enable GitHub's auto-merge once checks pass. Requires the repo to allow auto-merge.

autoRebase.description: Periodically rebase the version-PR branch on top of base. The rebase runs via `vis release ci rebase-pr` (cron-driven).

groupPreVersionCommands.description: Per-group pre-version hooks. Key is the group name (matches release.fixed/linked); value is a shell command.

releaseNoteTemplate.description: Operator-supplied header / footer wrapped around per-package GitHub / GitLab release bodies. Tokens: {name}, {version}, {previousVersion}, {date}, {repo}, {contributors}. {contributors} is a wave-scoped bullet list (block-only, keep on its own line) collected from change-file `author:` frontmatter. Skipped in aggregate-release mode. Release-please parity: #1274, #292.

header.description: Markdown prepended to each release body.

footer.description: Markdown appended to each release body.

aggregateReleaseTagPattern.description: Tag template for aggregateRelease. Tokens: {date}, {version}. Default: "release-{date}".

workspaceChangelog.description: Workspace-level CHANGELOG.md aggregating every release in a wave. Set false to disable.

gitlabHost.description: Self-hosted GitLab host (no scheme), e.g. "gitlab.example.com". Maps to the GITLAB_HOST env var that glab consumes.

githubHost.description: Self-hosted GitHub Enterprise host (no scheme), e.g. "github.acme.com". Maps to the GH_HOST env var that the gh CLI consumes. Ignored when provider != github.

httpProxy.description: HTTPS proxy URL (e.g. "http://proxy.acme.com:8080") for enterprise networks. Sets HTTPS_PROXY / HTTP_PROXY on gh / glab subprocess env AND injects an undici ProxyAgent into every internal fetch().

id.description: Disambiguator for log lines + doctor checks.

headers.description: Additional headers. Values run through template interpolation.

body.description: Body template. When omitted the full NotificationContext is sent as JSON; string leaves are interpolated.

path.description: File path. Workspace-root-relative on `release.publish.extraFiles`; package-directory-relative under `release.packages.<name>.extraFiles`.

replace.description: Substitution template. `{version}` is replaced with the new version literal. Standard regex backreferences ($1, $2, $&) work too. When omitted, the entire match is replaced with the new version.

versionActions.description: Built-in id (`npm`, `native-addon`, `private`, `shell`, `cargo`, `python`, `maven`, `container`, `jsr`) or a path to a custom implementation module.

publishCommand.description: Custom shell command run instead of `npm publish` (requires `allowCustomCommands`).

buildCommand.description: Custom shell command run before publish (requires `allowCustomCommands`).

buildContext.description: Build context passed to `docker buildx build` (the final positional argument). Honoured by the `container` versionActions; defaults to the package directory.

cargoTomlPath.description: Relative path from the package directory to `Cargo.toml` for the `cargo` versionActions. Set automatically by the `cargo()` preset from its `crateDir` option. Defaults to `Cargo.toml`.

checkPublished.description: Custom shell command that prints currently-published version to stdout.

containerBuildArgs.description: Extra `--build-arg KEY=VALUE` pairs forwarded to `docker buildx build`. Useful for stamping the version into the image at build time. Consumed by the `container` versionActions.

containerImage.description: Fully-qualified container image reference, e.g. `ghcr.io/scope/foo`. Required by the `container` versionActions (no built-in default since the registry hostname is operator-specific). Set automatically by the `container()` preset.

containerPlatforms.description: Target platforms passed to `docker buildx build --platform`. Defaults to `["linux/amd64", "linux/arm64"]`. Single-arch builds can pass a one-entry array.

containerSigning.description: Post-push signing scheme for the `container` versionActions. `cosign` runs `cosign sign --yes <image>:<version>` against the just-pushed immutable tag.

containerSkipLatest.description: Skip the conventional `:latest` floating tag on push. Useful for pre-release / channel-specific images that shouldn't move the shared `latest` pointer.

currentVersionResolver.description: Per-package override of the workspace-level currentVersionResolver. Useful when one package lags behind the registry / git-tag baseline.

mavenMetadataUrl.description: Override the Maven Central metadata URL used by the `maven` versionActions for already-published detection. Set this when publishing to a custom repository (Artifactory, Nexus, GitHub Packages); the URL should point at `<base>/<groupId>/<artifactId>/maven-metadata.xml`. Pass `""` (empty string) to disable the metadata check entirely.

pomPath.description: Override the path to `pom.xml` for the `maven` versionActions, relative to the package directory. Defaults to `pom.xml`.

pythonProjectDir.description: Relative path from the package directory to the directory containing `pyproject.toml` for the `python` versionActions. Set automatically by the `pyproject()` preset from its `projectDir` option. Defaults to the package directory.

skipNpmPublish.description: Skip the npm publish step but still create a git tag.

changedFilePatterns.description: Per-pkg override of `release.changedFilePatterns`. Replaces (does not merge).

additionalPaths.description: Extra workspace-root-relative globs that logically belong to this package. Changes matching any glob are attributed to this package by `vis release check --strict`. Release-please parity: #1921.

extraFiles.description: Per-package extra-files rules. Paths are package-directory-relative.

jsrConfigPath.description: Relative path from the package directory to the JSR manifest (jsr.json / deno.json) for the `jsr` versionActions. Set automatically by the `jsr()` preset from its `manifestPath` option.

uvLockPath.description: Relative path from the package directory to uv.lock. Recorded so doctor can warn when the lockfile is missing. vis does NOT mutate uv.lock itself — operators should run `uv lock` between version + commit if they want the lockfile committed.

root.description: Relative path (from the package directory) to the uv workspace root containing [tool.uv.workspace] members.

uvWorkspace.description: uv workspace marker. Triggers doctor's workspace-member check that the root pyproject lists this package.
